introSection: Dragon's Apprentice is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Windsor in Windsor, Berkshire, England, UK. It provides a gentler ride for guests not ready to ride the larger Dragon, which is located nearby.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After cresting the lift hill, the train enters a downward 360-degree helix which passes through a small castle turret. The train then makes its way to a tunnel, passing underneath the queue line and turning 90 degrees, back to the station.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is themed to a dragon.

fullText:
Dragon's Apprentice is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Windsor in Windsor, Berkshire, England, UK. It provides a gentler ride for guests not ready to ride the larger Dragon, which is located nearby.

After cresting the lift hill, the train enters a downward 360-degree helix which passes through a small castle turret. The train then makes its way to a tunnel, passing underneath the queue line and turning 90 degrees, back to the station.

Brown track and supports.

The train is themed to a dragon.
